Operation 'getVulnerabilityForApplication' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Original summary and description are too generic and lack specificity. The improved version clarifies that this retrieves a specific vulnerability by ID (not just 'a' vulnerability), specifies the required parameters (organization, application, and vulnerability IDs), identifies the return type (V4Vulnerability object), and provides domain context about what vulnerability data is returned. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: Gets a specific vulnerability in an application.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a specific application vulnerability by ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about a specific vulnerability detected in an application. Requires the organization ID, application ID, and vulnerability ID. Returns a V4Vulnerability object containing the weakness details, including the data flow pattern (rule), severity, status, and other vulnerability metadata. This operation is useful for examining individual vulnerability findings from Contrast Assess runtime detection.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too generic and lack specificity. The improved version clarifies that this retrieves a specific vulnerability by ID (not just 'a' vulnerability), specifies the required parameters (organization, application, and vulnerability IDs), identifies the return type (V4Vulnerability object), and provides domain context about what vulnerability data is returned. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'getRuleByRuleName' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context. Summary improved for clarity. Description enhanced with domain context about what rules are (data flow patterns), reference to V4Rule schema, and examples of common rule names to help AI agents understand the operation's purpose and scope.

data.current_description: Gets information about a rule by its name.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves information about a specific rule that defines a data flow pattern for categorizing vulnerability types. Returns the V4Rule object containing rule details. Common rules include sql-injection, ssrf, and reflected-xss. Requires both organizationId and ruleName path parameters.
data.reasoning: Summary improved for clarity. Description enhanced with domain context about what rules are (data flow patterns), reference to V4Rule schema, and examples of common rule names to help AI agents understand the operation's purpose and scope.

message: Operation 'getApplications' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context, missing_output_details. Original summary and description lack specificity. Added information about pagination, schema types (PageV4Application, V4Application), domain context about what applications represent, and clarified that access is role-based for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Gets a list of all applications that you have access to.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all applications in the organization that your user role has access to. Returns a PageV4Application object containing V4Application entries representing executable units of code (web apps, microservices, or other runnable code). Access is determined by user role permissions.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description lack specificity. Added information about pagination, schema types (PageV4Application, V4Application), domain context about what applications represent, and clarified that access is role-based for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'getApplication' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context. Original summary and description are too generic. Added specificity about returned schema (V4Application), clarified what an application represents in domain context, included examples of returned fields, and specified required parameters for AI agent clarity.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a specific application's details by its ID. Requires both organizationId and applicationId path parameters.

data.current_description: Returns all vulnerabilities for an application.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all weaknesses detected in a specific application by Contrast Assess at runtime. Returns a list of V4Vulnerability objects representing vulnerabilities found in the application's code. Requires both organizationId and applicationId path parameters.
data.reasoning: Summary improved for clarity and action orientation. Description enhanced with domain context about runtime detection by Contrast Assess, reference to V4Vulnerability schema, and clarification of required parameters for better AI agent interpretation.
